# Hubspot

## AI Registry — AIR-77

> Linear: [AIR-77](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-77/hubspot) · status **Evaluating** · updated 2026-05-05.

**Category:** CRM / Marketing & Sales Automation
**Cost:** Free tools; Starter ~$20; Professional ~$100; Enterprise ~$150
**Departments:** Commercial, Marketing
**Entity:** NYSE: HUBS. Founded 2006. 228,000+ customers.

## Overview

Leading cloud-based CRM and marketing/sales/service automation platform. Mid-market CRM market leader. Organised into Hubs (Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Operations, Commerce). Heavy AI investment via Breeze AI.

## Key Products

* **CRM (Free Core)** — contacts, companies, deals
* **Marketing Hub** — email, landing pages, social, automation, attribution
* **Sales Hub** — sequences, scheduling, pipeline, quotes, forecasting
* **Service Hub** — ticketing, KB, surveys, SLA
* **Content Hub** — CMS, blog, SEO, AI content
* **Operations Hub** — data sync, programmable automation
* **Commerce Hub** — invoicing, payment links, subscriptions
* **Breeze AI** — Copilot (in-app), Agents (autonomous: content, social, prospecting, support), Intelligence (enrichment, buyer intent)

## Integrations & Gate 1 Status

* **G1.1 Google Workspace** ✅ PASS — native Gmail, Calendar, Drive
* **G1.2 Slack** ✅ PASS — native app with notifications, workflow triggers
* **G1.3 Data Portability** ✅ PASS — CSV export, full API, GDPR portability
* **G1.4 Data Training Exclusion** ⚠️ TBC — must confirm Breeze AI handling
* **G1.5 API** ✅ PASS — REST at developers.hubspot.com
* **MCP server available** — mcp.hubspot.com ✅ G2.1
* 1,700+ Marketplace integrations

## Security

* SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR
* EU data hosting (Frankfurt)
* SSO/SAML on Enterprise tier; Google Workspace SSO on Professional+

## CRM Matrix (Andrew Weekly 5 May 2026)

Under evaluation alongside Attio (AIR-76), monday CRM (AIR-83), Salesforce (AIR-93). Gate 1 PRELIMINARY: PASS pending G1.4 confirmation.

## Considerations

* Pricing complexity — Professional/Enterprise where useful features live
* SAML SSO Enterprise-only
* G1.4 data training exclusion is hard requirement
* Migration effort if existing contact/deal data
* Annual commitments on Professional+

*Evaluating. Functional tier. Requested by Andrew Soane (CMO) via HubSpot AE Tony Berner.*
